summary: Iteration 33 - Architectural Fix for Admin Cliente Preview Testing Complete. All 7 test cases PASSED. The fix ensures admin sidebar remains visible when viewing cliente wizard in preview mode. Key verification: setNav('cliente-preview') instead of setMode('cliente') preserves admin layout.
critical_code_review_comments: ARCHITECTURAL FIX VERIFIED: ViewSwitcher 'Vista Cliente' now uses setNav('cliente-preview') instead of setMode('cliente')
SIDEBAR PRESERVATION VERIFIED: Admin sidebar (OPERATIVO, ACQUISIZIONE, PARTNER sections) remains visible during cliente preview
PREVIEW BANNER VERIFIED: Blue banner shows 'Preview Wizard Cliente (Demo)' or 'Preview Cliente: {name}' with 'Chiudi Preview' button
WIZARD DISPLAY VERIFIED: ClienteWizard renders with adminPreview=true, showing 7-step progress bar and 'Benvenuto in Evolution PRO'
CLOSE PREVIEW VERIFIED: Clicking 'Chiudi Preview' returns to 'clienti' (Gestione Clienti) page with sidebar intact
PIPELINE INTEGRATION VERIFIED: ProspectPipeline chevron click opens cliente preview with sidebar preserved
BACKEND AUTH VERIFIED: /api/auth/login returns role='admin' correctly for admin user

success_rate.backend: 100% - Login endpoint returns correct admin role

context_for_next_testing_agent: Architectural fix for admin cliente preview is working correctly. When admin clicks 'Vista Cliente' or opens a client from Pipeline/AdminClientiPanel, the sidebar remains visible and the wizard is shown in preview mode with a blue banner and 'Chiudi Preview' button. The mode stays 'admin' and only nav changes to 'cliente-preview'.

test_1_admin_login_sidebar.details: Admin login loads dashboard with sidebar visible (OPERATIVO, ACQUISIZIONE, PARTNER sections)

test_2_vista_cliente_sidebar_preserved.details: Clicking 'Vista Cliente' in ViewSwitcher keeps sidebar visible, shows preview banner and wizard

test_3_chiudi_preview_returns_to_clienti.details: Clicking 'Chiudi Preview' returns to 'Gestione Clienti' page with sidebar intact

test_4_pipeline_navigation.details: Pipeline page (ProspectPipeline) loads correctly with sidebar visible

test_5_pipeline_client_preview.details: Clicking chevron on client row opens preview with sidebar preserved, wizard visible with 7-step progress bar

test_6_close_preview_from_pipeline.details: Closing preview from Pipeline returns to Gestione Clienti with sidebar visible

mocked_apis.canva_api: MOCKED - Canva API integration is mocked
mocked_apis.kling_ai_api: MOCKED - Kling AI API integration is mocked
